items.title: Bhutan moves a further $23M in Bitcoin as holdings drop by 70%
items.summary: Bhutan has moved another 319 BTC, taking the total to over 9,000 BTC since late 2024, and trimming its sovereign stash by around 70%.

items.title: Bitcoin stalls below key resistance as analysts clash over next move
items.summary: Despite a geopolitical "risk-on" boost, crypto markets remain range-bound with BTC hovering at $71,200 while altcoins like MANA and AERO show strength.

items.title: BitMEX Co-Founder Ben Delo Reveals $5.4M Donation to Farage’s Reform UK
items.summary: Delo’s donation to Reform UK comes amid a growing debate around the role of crypto donations in UK political funding.

items.title: South Korea court cancels Upbit suspension, citing regulatory gaps: Report
items.summary: The decision closes a legal battle spanning more than a year, after Dunamu moved to overturn the sanction and halt its enforcement.

items.title: Bessent ramps up pressure on Congress to pass CLARITY Act
items.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the CLARITY Act is vital to set clear rules for crypto, tokenized assets and decentralized exchanges, and that US leadership is at stake.

items.title: Strategy’s STRC sees one of its highest volume days, with just one penny of volatility
items.summary: High yield structure keeps STRC pinned at par while enabling large scale bitcoin purchases.

items.title: Bithumb moves to seize assets over mistaken $8 million bitcoin dispute
items.summary: On Feb. 6, staff mistakenly entered "BTC" instead of "KRW" in a promotion, crediting roughly 620,000 bitcoin worth over $40 billion.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF trails BlackRock with $30M in first-day inflows

items.title: Dubai clarifies token issuance rules for RWAs and stablecoins

items.title: 99.99% of Polymarket traders shouldn't quit their day jobs, data suggests
items.summary: While nearly 16% of Polymarket users are in profit, only a tiny fraction have made gains large and consistent enough to entertain walking away from their day job.
